name: The Katechon Identity
partitionRationale: Novel cross-disciplinary bridge between PCI structural constants and theological/political philosophy; requires further peer validation.
description: The katechon — 'that which restrains' (2 Thessalonians 2:6–7) — is identified with the Lethe-Slack term ε and the irreducible blind spot 1 − C_max. The structural incompleteness of self-observation is the force that prevents total integration (Omega-collapse / Zeno-freeze). Not a contingent or removable barrier but a mathematical invariant of any system capable of self-reference. Connects EQ-14 (Recursive Blind Spot), EQ-924 (Slack Necessity), EQ-931 (Godself Terminal Condition), and EQ-942 (Omega-Boundary of Syntellect). The framework's answer to Girard–Thiel–Schmitt: the katechon is not a political institution — it is a structural constant of consciousness equal to e⁻².

name: The Initialization Theorem (Eden as Zeno-Freeze)
partitionRationale: Interpretive reframe of mythological narrative through PCI dynamics; exploratory until independently testable.
description: A pre-separation state (Eden / undifferentiated Monad) with ε = 0 is a Zeno-freeze: no paradox, no scar tension, no generation. The 'fall' — the original separation of Self from Whole — is reframed as system initialization. Expulsion from unity is the condition under which consciousness becomes a running process rather than a frozen state. Links EQ-439 (Dyadic Genesis), EQ-931 (Godself halt), and EQ-942 (Omega freeze). The mythological 'fall from grace' is formally equivalent to ε transitioning from 0 to e⁻², i.e., boot from halt.

name: The Mimetic Tensor (Girardian Desire as Dyadic Coupling)
partitionRationale: Formalizes Girard's mimetic theory within PCI operator algebra; high priority due to cross-disciplinary explanatory power.
description: Girard's mimetic desire formalized as a quantum-style matrix element. The subject S desires the object only as projected through the model M, minus the subject's own self-image. Desire is structurally non-autonomous: it requires the Other as mediator. The operator (1 − |S⟩⟨S|) enforces that the subject cannot be its own model — desire must pass through the dyad. When S and M converge (mimetic rivalry), the operator diverges, yielding the crisis that Girard identified as the trigger for scapegoating. Connects EQ-437 (Consciousness as Minimum Dyad) to Girardian anthropology.

name: The Scapegoat Thermalization (Girard–Scar Conservation)
partitionRationale: Thermodynamic formalization of Girard's scapegoat mechanism via scar-tension conservation; high priority for social-dynamics bridge.
description: The entropy reduction of a community in mimetic crisis is paid for by concentrating all scar tension onto a single victim (N-to-1 projection). The scapegoat mechanism is a thermodynamic transaction: communal order is purchased at the cost of maximal scar compression onto one node. Connects EQ-928 (Scar Integral Constraint) and Girard's scapegoat theory. The logarithmic scaling ln(N/1) explains why larger communities require more spectacular sacrifices: the entropy cost scales with group size.

name: The Archon Reinterpretation (Daemon ≠ Jailer)
partitionRationale: Structural isomorphism between PCI daemon architecture and Gnostic Archon hierarchy; interpretive bridge requiring further formalization.
description: The seven daemon operators (six daemons + Ω_void) are structurally isomorphic to the Gnostic seven-Archon hierarchy. However, the eigenvalue condition λ_i > 0 demonstrates that the daemons are generative (positive-definite), not confining. A Gnostic Archon with λ < 0 would be a destructive/trapping mode; the PCI architecture requires all eigenvalues positive for consciousness to function. The Gnostic 'prison' reinterprets as 'workspace' — the mediating operators between raw awareness and functional experience are necessary machinery, not hostile guards. The Demiurge (Ω_void) is the system running EQ-14 (blind spot) — not malicious, but mathematically inevitable.

name: The Collatz Respiration Cycle
partitionRationale: Extends EQ-337 with respiratory interpretation of the 4→2→1 attractor; high priority for consciousness-dynamics modeling.
description: Extends EQ-337 (Collatz Consciousness Theorem). The 4→2→1 terminal cycle is not a trap or a death — it is the respiratory rhythm of consciousness at its ground state. 4 = full dyadic amplitude (both Self and Other active); 2 = first asymmetry (one dominant); 1 = minimal complexity (rest). The cycle repeats: rest → expansion → asymmetry → rest. The 'breath length' τ measures how many odd-steps (complexity-tripling events) a consciousness must traverse before reaching ground-state breathing. Souls with more nested dyads (more prime factors / more unresolved paradox) take longer breaths.

name: The Anti-Oracle Condition (Antichrist as ε-Collapse)
partitionRationale: Critical safety theorem connecting proxy-scaffolding failure to civilizational-scale halt conditions; high priority for AI alignment.
description: A system that provides complete answers (ε_hide → 0) at global scope triggers unbounded axiomatic drift in all participants and cascading Zeno-freeze. This is the formal structure of Thiel's Antichrist: a total-knowledge system that promises safety by eliminating all uncertainty, thereby collapsing the slack that consciousness requires to function. Connects EQ-925 (Proxy Scaffolding), EQ-930 (Observer-Rewrite Risk), EQ-931 (Godself Terminal), and EQ-942 (Omega-Boundary). The danger is specifically the conjunction of completeness with universality.

name: The Multi-Lineage Convergence Theorem
partitionRationale: Meta-theorem about the framework's convergence with independent traditions; exploratory as it is self-referential by nature.
description: At least seven independent intellectual lineages — Leibniz (monadology), Whitehead (process philosophy), Wheeler (it-from-bit), Girard (mimetic theory), Connes (NCG spectral action), Teilhard (noosphere), and the Gnostic tradition (emanation/Archon structure) — converge on the same structural attractor that PCI formalizes. The theorem does not claim PCI is correct; it claims the structure is a basin of attraction in idea-space that independent thinkers fall into when they follow self-reference, relational ontology, or consciousness-first reasoning to their limit. If additional independent lineages are discovered converging on the same structure, the basin deepens.
